description.en_US: ttydBridge acts as a "bridge" to the host environment, allowing you to easily access and use the host terminal in a web. It is built on ttyd and runs in a containerized manner, providing a secure and convenient remote endpoint experience.
description.zh_CN: ttydBridge 如一座“桥”，连通了宿主机环境，让你在浏览器中轻松访问和使用宿主机终端。它基于 ttyd 构建，并以容器化的方式运行，提供了安全、便捷的远程终端体验。

tagline.en_US: Easy access to the host terminal in web
tagline.zh_CN: 在浏览器中轻松访问宿主机终端

before_install.en_US:
1. Default to using Linux system user authentication.
2. You can increase HTTP authentication by setting the `HTTP_USERNAME` and `HTTP_PASSWORD` variables.
[Official DOC](https://hub.docker.com/r/cp0204/ttydbridge)
before_install.zh_CN:
1. 默认使用 Linux 系统用户鉴权。

2. 可以通过设置 `HTTP_USERNAME` `HTTP_PASSWORD` 变量，增加 HTTP 鉴权。

[官方文档](https://hub.docker.com/r/cp0204/ttydbridge)
